BLACK_BLOOD.title: Black Ichor
BLACK_BLOOD.description: At the end of combat, heal 12 HP.
BLACK_BLOOD.flavor: The dungeon bleeds dark. So do you.
BOUND_PHYLACTERY.title: Bound Soul Jar
BOUND_PHYLACTERY.description: Ethereal. Gain 1 Energy at start of each turn. When unbound, transform.
BOUND_PHYLACTERY.flavor: Sealed by the Dungeon Master himself.
BURNING_BLOOD.title: Burning Crawler Blood
BURNING_BLOOD.description: At the end of combat, heal 6 HP.
BURNING_BLOOD.flavor: It burns going in and coming out.
CRACKED_CORE.title: Cracked AI Core
CRACKED_CORE.description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.
CRACKED_CORE.flavor: Even broken dungeon AI has its uses.
DIVINE_DESTINY.title: Crawler Destiny
DIVINE_DESTINY.description: At the start of each combat, Scry 3.
DIVINE_DESTINY.flavor: The audience already knows your fate.
DIVINE_RIGHT.title: Dungeon Right
DIVINE_RIGHT.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Mantra.
DIVINE_RIGHT.flavor: By decree of the Primus, you may continue.
INFUSED_CORE.title: Infused AI Core
INFUSED_CORE.description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Dark.
INFUSED_CORE.flavor: Hacked with a level 3 intelligence mod.
PHYLACTERY_UNBOUND.title: Unbound Soul Jar
PHYLACTERY_UNBOUND.description: Gain 1 Energy at start of each turn. 1 extra card draw per turn.
RING_OF_THE_DRAKE.title: Ring of the Wyrm
RING_OF_THE_DRAKE.description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 extra cards.
RING_OF_THE_DRAKE.flavor: Taken from a floor 9 drake hoard.
RING_OF_THE_SNAKE.title: Ring of the Naga
RING_OF_THE_SNAKE.description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 extra cards.
RING_OF_THE_SNAKE.flavor: Slithered off a dead naga's finger.
AMETHYST_AUBERGINE.title: Cursed Eggplant Crystal
AMETHYST_AUBERGINE.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain 1 Strength.
ANCHOR.title: Floor Anchor
BLOOD_VIAL.title: Vial of Crawler Blood
BLOOD_VIAL.description: At the start of each combat, heal 2 HP.
BONE_FLUTE.title: Bone Flute of the Dead
BONE_FLUTE.description: Whenever an enemy dies, gain 1 Mantra.
BONE_FLUTE.flavor: Carved from a floor 4 skeleton's femur.
BOOK_OF_FIVE_RINGS.title: Book of Five Floors
BOOK_OF_FIVE_RINGS.description: Your 5th Attack each combat does double damage.
BOOK_OF_FIVE_RINGS.flavor: Each chapter details a different floor's horrors.
BRONZE_SCALES.title: Crawler Scales
BRONZE_SCALES.description: Whenever you take damage, deal 3 damage back.
BRONZE_SCALES.flavor: Crawler skin grows thick after floor 3.
CENTENNIAL_PUZZLE.title: Stairwell Puzzle
CENTENNIAL_PUZZLE.description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw 3 cards.
CENTENNIAL_PUZZLE.flavor: Solve it between floors. Or during. Whatever.
DATA_DISK.title: Dungeon Data Chip
FENCING_MANUAL.title: Crawler Combat Manual
FENCING_MANUAL.description: Start each combat with 1 extra card in hand.
FENCING_MANUAL.flavor: Step 1: Don't die. Step 2: See step 1.
FESTIVE_POPPER.title: Loot Box Confetti Popper
FESTIVE_POPPER.description: Whenever you open a chest, gain a random potion.
GORGET.title: Crawler Gorget
GORGET.description: Whenever you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 Dexterity.
GORGET.flavor: Protects the neck. The dungeon goes for the neck.
HAPPY_FLOWER.title: Dungeon Bloom
HAPPY_FLOWER.flavor: It smiles. Why does it smile.
JUZU_BRACELET.title: Anti-Mob Bracelet
JUZU_BRACELET.description: Regular enemies no longer appear in ? rooms.
LANTERN.title: Descender's Torch
LANTERN.description: Gain 1 Energy on the first turn of each combat.
MEAL_TICKET.title: Cafeteria Pass
MEAL_TICKET.description: Whenever you enter a shop, heal 15 HP.
MEAL_TICKET.flavor: The dungeon food court. Somehow exists.
ODDLY_SMOOTH_STONE.title: Oddly Smooth Dungeon Stone
ODDLY_SMOOTH_STONE.flavor: Suspiciously polished. Someone's been here before.
PENDULUM.title: Broadcast Timer
PENDULUM.description: Every other turn, gain 1 Energy. Other turns gain 1 Focus.
PENDULUM.flavor: Tick tock. The audience is watching.
PERMAFROST.title: Permafrost Core
PERMAFROST.description: Start each combat with 3 Frost Channels.
POTION_BELT.title: Crawler Utility Belt
POTION_BELT.flavor: Like a fanny pack, but cooler. Barely.
RED_SKULL.title: Red Dungeon Skull
RED_SKULL.description: While your HP is at or below 50%, gain 3 Strength.
RED_SKULL.flavor: Glows brighter as you get closer to death.
REGAL_PILLOW.title: Sponsor's Luxury Pillow
REGAL_PILLOW.description: Heal an additional 15 HP whenever you Rest.
REGAL_PILLOW.flavor: Brought to you by SleepWell™ - Official Dungeon Sponsor.
SNECKO_SKULL.title: Snecko Crawler Skull
SNECKO_SKULL.description: Whenever you apply Poison, apply 1 additional Poison.
STRAWBERRY.title: Floor Berry
STRAWBERRY.flavor: Grows in the cracks between floors.
STRIKE_DUMMY.title: Training Dummy of Pain
STRIKE_DUMMY.flavor: Beat it until you feel better.
TINY_MAILBOX.title: Crawler Mailbox
TINY_MAILBOX.description: At the start of each combat, add a random colorless card to hand.
TINY_MAILBOX.flavor: Fan mail from the audience. Mostly death threats.
VAJRA.title: Dungeon Fist Charm
VENERABLE_TEA_SET.title: Pre-Fight Tea Ceremony
VENERABLE_TEA_SET.description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start next combat with 2 Energy.
VENERABLE_TEA_SET.flavor: Take a moment. Sip. Contemplate your mortality.
WAR_PAINT.title: Crawler War Paint
WAR_PAINT.flavor: The audience loves a good look.
WHETSTONE.title: Dungeon Whetstone
WHETSTONE.flavor: Sharp enough to cut through floor tile.
AKABEKO.title: Cursed Cattle Mob
AKABEKO.description: Your first Attack each combat deals 8 additional damage.
AKABEKO.flavor: A dungeon cow that won't stop following you.
BAG_OF_MARBLES.title: Bag of Caltrops
BAG_OF_MARBLES.description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
BAG_OF_MARBLES.flavor: Scatter them. Watch the mobs slip.
BAG_OF_PREPARATION.title: Crawler Go-Bag
BAG_OF_PREPARATION.description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
BAG_OF_PREPARATION.flavor: Always be prepared. The dungeon isn't.
BELLOWS.title: Dungeon Bellows
BELLOWS.description: At the start of combat, gain 6 Block.
BOOK_REPAIR_KNIFE.title: Floor Carving Knife
BOOK_REPAIR_KNIFE.description: Whenever you Upgrade a card, gain 1 Strength.
BOOK_REPAIR_KNIFE.flavor: Originally for carving escape routes. Now for carving enemies.
BOWLER_HAT.title: Mordecai's Top Hat
BOWLER_HAT.description: Whenever you play a Power, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
BOWLER_HAT.flavor: He said it was lucky. He lied.
CANDELABRA.title: Dungeon Candelabra
CANDELABRA.description: Start each combat with 3 additional cards in hand.
ETERNAL_FEATHER.title: Eternal Crawler Feather
ETERNAL_FEATHER.description: For every 5 cards in your deck, heal 3 HP when entering a new room.
ETERNAL_FEATHER.flavor: Plucked from something that should have stayed dead.
FUNERARY_MASK.title: Floor Boss Death Mask
FUNERARY_MASK.description: Whenever an enemy dies, gain 2 Block.
FUNERARY_MASK.flavor: Wear the face of your defeated foes. For ratings.
GALACTIC_DUST.title: Sponsor Glitter Dust
GALACTIC_DUST.description: Whenever you play a Power, gain 1 Focus.
GALACTIC_DUST.flavor: Sparkle provided by your episode sponsor.
GOLD_PLATED_CABLES.title: Dungeon Wiring
GOLD_PLATED_CABLES.description: Your first Power each combat costs 0.
GOLD_PLATED_CABLES.flavor: The dungeon runs on gold. Literally.
GREMLIN_HORN.title: Goblin Raider Horn
GREMLIN_HORN.description: Whenever an enemy dies, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.
GREMLIN_HORN.flavor: Snap it off. Keep it. It's yours now.
HORN_CLEAT.title: Stairwell Cleat
HORN_CLEAT.description: At the start of turn 2, gain 14 Block.
HORN_CLEAT.flavor: Grip the stairs. Don't slip between floors.
JOSS_PAPER.title: Crawler Offering Paper
JOSS_PAPER.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, gain 1 Focus.
KUSARIGAMA.title: Chain Flail of the Borough
KUSARIGAMA.description: Whenever you play a Skill, the next Attack deals 3 more damage.
LETTER_OPENER.title: Fan Mail Opener
LETTER_OPENER.description: Whenever you play 3 Skills in a turn, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
LETTER_OPENER.flavor: For opening the audience's strongly worded letters.
LUCKY_FYSH.title: Lucky Dungeon Fysh
LUCKY_FYSH.description: Whenever you play a Power, draw 1 card.
MERCURY_HOURGLASS.title: Broadcast Hourglass
MERCURY_HOURGLASS.description: At the start of each turn, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
MERCURY_HOURGLASS.flavor: Your time is valuable. The audience's more so.
MINIATURE_CANNON.title: Miniature Siege Engine
MINIATURE_CANNON.description: At the start of combat, deal 7 damage to ALL enemies.
MINIATURE_CANNON.flavor: Tiny but effective. Like Princess Donut.
NUNCHAKU.title: Crawler Nunchucks
NUNCHAKU.description: Every time you play 10 Attacks, gain 1 Energy.
NUNCHAKU.flavor: Look cool. Hit yourself. Look cool again.
ORICHALCUM.title: Dungeon Orichalcum
ORICHALCUM.description: If you end your turn without Block, gain 6 Block.
ORICHALCUM.flavor: Ancient ore from the deepest floors.
ORNAMENTAL_FAN.title: Audience Fan
ORNAMENTAL_FAN.description: Whenever you play 3 Attacks in a turn, gain 4 Block.
ORNAMENTAL_FAN.flavor: The audience waves. You block. Synergy.
PANTOGRAPH.title: Dungeon Architect's Tool
PANTOGRAPH.description: At the start of Boss combats, heal 25 HP.
PANTOGRAPH.flavor: Even floor bosses respect proper measurements.
PAPER_PHROG.title: Paper Phrog
PAPER_PHROG.description: When you play an Attack with a debuff, apply 1 additional Weak.
PAPER_PHROG.flavor: It croaks when you fold it wrong.
PARRYING_SHIELD.title: Crawler Buckler
PARRYING_SHIELD.description: Whenever you play a Skill, gain 1 Block.
PEAR.title: Dungeon Pear
PEN_NIB.title: Crawler's Quill
PEN_NIB.description: Every 10th Attack you play deals double damage.
PEN_NIB.flavor: The pen is mightier. Especially the 10th stroke.
PETRIFIED_TOAD.title: Petrified Floor Toad
PETRIFIED_TOAD.description: Whenever you play a Power, gain 1 random potion.
PETRIFIED_TOAD.flavor: Lick it. Don't lick it. Your call.
PLANISPHERE.title: Dungeon Floor Map
PLANISPHERE.description: At the start of combat, play the first card in your hand.
PLANISPHERE.flavor: Outdated, but the mobs haven't moved.
RED_MASK.title: Red Audience Mask
RED_MASK.description: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Weak to ALL enemies.
RED_MASK.flavor: The crowd goes wild when you wear it.
REGALITE.title: Primus Crystal
REGALITE.description: Whenever you gain Block from a card, gain 3 additional Block.
REPTILE_TRINKET.title: Mongo's Scale
REPTILE_TRINKET.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Artifact.
REPTILE_TRINKET.flavor: A single scale from Carl's pet dinosaur.
RIPPLE_BASIN.title: Floor Pool Basin
RIPPLE_BASIN.description: Whenever you gain Focus, gain 1 additional Focus.
RIPPLE_BASIN.flavor: The water shows other floors. Don't stare.
SELF_FORMING_CLAY.title: Self-Forming Dungeon Clay
SELF_FORMING_CLAY.description: Whenever you lose HP in combat, gain 3 Block next turn.
SPARKLING_ROUGE.title: Camera-Ready Blush
SPARKLING_ROUGE.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, heal 1 HP.
SPARKLING_ROUGE.flavor: Look good for the broadcast. Always.
STONE_CRACKER.title: Floor Cracker
STONE_CRACKER.description: Whenever you play 3 Skills in a turn, gain 1 Strength.
STONE_CRACKER.flavor: For breaking through to the next floor.
SYMBIOTIC_VIRUS.title: Dungeon Parasite
SYMBIOTIC_VIRUS.description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Dark.
SYMBIOTIC_VIRUS.flavor: It feeds on you. You feed on it. Everyone wins.
TINGSHA.title: Crawler Chimes
TINGSHA.description: Whenever you discard a card, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
TUNING_FORK.title: Broadcast Frequency Fork
TUNING_FORK.description: At the end of turn, if you have no Block, Channel 1 Lightning.
TUNING_FORK.flavor: Tuned to the dungeon's broadcast frequency.
TWISTED_FUNNEL.title: Poison Drip Funnel
TWISTED_FUNNEL.description: At the start of each combat, apply 4 Poison to ALL enemies.
VAMBRACE.title: Crawler Vambrace
VAMBRACE.description: Whenever you play a Skill, gain 1 Dexterity this turn.
VAMBRACE.flavor: Forearm protection. Your forearms need it.
ART_OF_WAR.title: Art of Crawling
ART_OF_WAR.description: If you do not play a Skill during your turn, gain 1 extra Energy next turn.
ART_OF_WAR.flavor: The best defense is punching everything.
BEATING_REMNANT.title: Still-Beating Heart Chunk
BEATING_REMNANT.description: Whenever you play a card with Retain, gain 3 Block.
BIG_HAT.title: Floor Boss Trophy Hat
BIG_HAT.description: Whenever you play a Power, gain 1 Dexterity.
BIG_HAT.flavor: The bigger the hat, the better the crawler.
BOOKMARK.title: Dungeon Bookmark
BOOKMARK.description: Every 3 turns, return a random card from discard to hand.
BOOKMARK.flavor: Saves your place. The dungeon doesn't care.
CAPTAINS_WHEEL.title: Borough Captain's Wheel
CAPTAINS_WHEEL.description: At the start of turn 3, gain 18 Block.
CHANDELIER.title: Dungeon Chandelier
CHANDELIER.description: At the start of combat, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies 3 times.
CHANDELIER.flavor: Cut the chain. Watch it fall. Classic.
CHARONS_ASHES.title: Stairwell Ashes
CHARONS_ASHES.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
CHARONS_ASHES.flavor: Remains of crawlers who didn't make it.
CLOAK_CLASP.title: Crawler's Cloak Clasp
CLOAK_CLASP.description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 Block for each card in hand.
CLOAK_CLASP.flavor: Holds together what little you have left.
DEMON_TONGUE.title: Floor Demon's Tongue
DEMON_TONGUE.description: Whenever you play a Power, reduce ALL enemies' Strength by 1.
EMOTION_CHIP.title: AI Emotion Chip
EMOTION_CHIP.description: If you lost HP during the last turn, trigger the passive ability of all Orbs.
EMOTION_CHIP.flavor: Now the dungeon AI can feel sad about killing you.
FROZEN_EGG.title: Frozen Mob Egg
FROZEN_EGG.description: Whenever you add a Power to your deck, it is Upgraded.
GAMBLING_CHIP.title: Gambler's Loot Token
GAMBLING_CHIP.description: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards, then draw that many.
GAMBLING_CHIP.flavor: The house always wins. You're not the house.
GAME_PIECE.title: Dungeon Game Piece
GAME_PIECE.description: Whenever a card is Retained, it deals 3 more damage this combat.
GAME_PIECE.flavor: You are the game piece. The audience is the player.
GIRYA.title: Dungeon Kettlebell
GIRYA.flavor: Even in a death dungeon, never skip arm day.
HELICAL_DART.title: Spiral Crawler Dart
HELICAL_DART.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal 7 damage to a random enemy.
HELICAL_DART.flavor: Spins through the air with malicious intent.
ICE_CREAM.title: Skull Juice Popsicle
ICE_CREAM.description: Energy is now conserved between turns.
INTIMIDATING_HELMET.title: Intimidating Floor Helm
INTIMIDATING_HELMET.description: Whenever you gain Block, enemies lose 1 Strength until end of turn.
INTIMIDATING_HELMET.flavor: The horns are cosmetic. The fear is real.
IVORY_TILE.title: Dungeon Floor Tile
IVORY_TILE.description: Whenever you play a Skill, reduce a random card's cost by 1 this turn.
IVORY_TILE.flavor: Pried from between floors. Someone will miss it.
KUNAI.title: Crawler's Throwing Knife
KUNAI.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a turn, gain 1 Dexterity.
KUNAI.flavor: Aim for the eyes. Always the eyes.
LASTING_CANDY.title: Everlasting Dungeon Candy
LASTING_CANDY.description: Whenever you Rest, add a random Upgraded card to your deck.
LASTING_CANDY.flavor: Never dissolves. Never stops being delicious.
LIZARD_TAIL.title: Regenerating Mob Tail
LIZARD_TAIL.description: When you would die, heal to 50% of your Max HP instead. (Once per run).
LIZARD_TAIL.flavor: One free resurrection. The audience loves a comeback.
LUNAR_PASTRY.title: Lunar Floor Pastry
MANGO.title: Dungeon Mango
MANGO.flavor: Where do these grow? Nobody knows.
MEAT_ON_THE_BONE.title: Mystery Meat on a Stick
MEAT_ON_THE_BONE.description: If your HP is at or below 50% at the end of combat, heal 12 HP.
MEAT_ON_THE_BONE.flavor: Don't ask what it was. Just eat.
METRONOME.title: Broadcast Metronome
METRONOME.description: Whenever you play a card that has a different type from the last, gain 1 Block.
METRONOME.flavor: Keep the rhythm. The audience demands it.
MINI_REGENT.title: Mini Primus Statue
MINI_REGENT.description: At the start of Elite combats, gain 2 Strength.
MINI_REGENT.flavor: A tiny figurine of absolute power.
MOLTEN_EGG.title: Molten Mob Egg
MOLTEN_EGG.description: Whenever you add an Attack to your deck, it is Upgraded.
MOLTEN_EGG.flavor: It's not an egg. It's a promise of violence.
MUMMIFIED_HAND.title: Mummified Crawler Hand
MUMMIFIED_HAND.description: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in hand costs 0 this turn.
MUMMIFIED_HAND.flavor: Previous owner didn't need it anymore.
OLD_COIN.title: Dungeon Coin
ORANGE_DOUGH.title: Orange Floor Dough
ORANGE_DOUGH.description: Whenever you Rest, gain a random rare relic.
PAPER_KRANE.title: Paper Crane Bomb
PAPER_KRANE.description: Enemies with Weak deal 40% less damage instead of 25%.
POCKETWATCH.title: Broadcast Pocketwatch
POCKETWATCH.description: Whenever you play 3 or fewer cards on your turn, draw 3 extra next turn.
POWER_CELL.title: Dungeon Power Cell
POWER_CELL.description: Start each combat with 1 additional Orb slot.
PRAYER_WHEEL.title: Loot Prayer Wheel
PRAYER_WHEEL.description: Regular enemies drop an extra card reward.
PRAYER_WHEEL.flavor: Spin and pray for something useful.
RAINBOW_RING.title: Prismatic Crawler Ring
RAINBOW_RING.description: Whenever you Channel an Orb, Channel an additional random Orb.
RAINBOW_RING.flavor: All the colors. All the power.
RAZOR_TOOTH.title: Floor Mob's Razor Tooth
RAZOR_TOOTH.description: Whenever you lose HP, deal 2 damage to ALL enemies.
RUINED_HELMET.title: Ruined Crawler Helm
RUINED_HELMET.description: Whenever you Scry, gain Block equal to the number of cards Scryed.
RUINED_HELMET.flavor: Cracked, but the magic still works.
SHURIKEN.title: Crawler's Star Blade
SHURIKEN.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a turn, gain 1 Strength.
SHOVEL.title: Crawler's Digging Shovel
SHOVEL.description: You can now dig at Rest Sites.
SHOVEL.flavor: For digging through floors. Or graves.
STONE_CALENDAR.title: Dungeon Countdown Calendar
STONE_CALENDAR.description: At the end of turn 7, deal 52 damage to ALL enemies.
STURDY_CLAMP.title: Dungeon Lock Clamp
STURDY_CLAMP.description: At the start of turn 2, gain 2 Artifact.
TOUGH_BANDAGES.title: Crawler's Tough Bandages
TOUGH_BANDAGES.description: Whenever you discard a card, gain 3 Block.
TOUGH_BANDAGES.flavor: Applied with dungeon tape and hope.
TOXIC_EGG.title: Toxic Mob Egg
TOXIC_EGG.description: Whenever you add a Skill to your deck, it is Upgraded.
TUNGSTEN_ROD.title: Tungsten Crawler Rod
TUNGSTEN_ROD.description: Whenever you would lose HP, lose 1 less.
UNCEASING_TOP.title: Unceasing Loot Spinner
UNCEASING_TOP.description: Whenever your hand is empty, draw 1 card.
UNCEASING_TOP.flavor: It never stops. Neither should you.
UNSETTLING_LAMP.title: Unsettling Dungeon Lamp
UNSETTLING_LAMP.description: Whenever you Rest, gain 1 Energy next combat.
VEXING_PUZZLEBOX.title: Vexing Floor Puzzlebox
VEXING_PUZZLEBOX.description: At the start of combat, shuffle 3 random colorless cards into draw pile.
VEXING_PUZZLEBOX.flavor: Solve it for prizes. Or don't. Prizes anyway.
WHITE_BEAST_STATUE.title: White Dungeon Beast Idol
WHITE_BEAST_STATUE.flavor: The beast it depicts has been dead for centuries.
WHITE_STAR.title: Crawler's Guiding Star
WHITE_STAR.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, gain 1 Energy.
WHITE_STAR.flavor: Follow it. Or don't. It follows you anyway.
THE_COURIER.title: Dungeon Courier
THE_COURIER.description: The shop has more items and a discount.
BELT_BUCKLE.title: Sponsor Belt Buckle
BELT_BUCKLE.description: Gain 2 Block at the start of each turn.
BELT_BUCKLE.flavor: Sponsored by BeltCo™ - Hold It Together.
BREAD.title: Stale Crawler Bread
BREAD.description: At the start of each combat, heal 5 HP.
BREAD.flavor: Hard enough to use as a weapon.
BRIMSTONE.title: Brimstone Core
BRIMSTONE.description: At the start of each turn, ALL players gain 2 Strength. Enemies gain 1 Strength.
BRIMSTONE.flavor: The floors heat up. Everyone suffers.
BURNING_STICKS.title: Burning Floor Sticks
BURNING_STICKS.description: Whenever you play a card, deal 1 damage to ALL enemies.
BURNING_STICKS.flavor: Light everything on fire. It's a strategy.
CAULDRON.title: Dungeon Cauldron
CHEMICAL_X.title: Chemical Floor-X
CHEMICAL_X.description: Whenever you play an X cost card, its effects are increased by 2.
DINGY_RUG.title: Merchant's Dirty Rug
DINGY_RUG.flavor: Everything on this rug fell off a truck.
DOLLYS_MIRROR.title: Donut's Mirror
DOLLYS_MIRROR.description: Upon pickup, duplicate a card in your deck.
DOLLYS_MIRROR.flavor: Donut admires herself. You copy a card.
DRAGON_FRUIT.title: Dragon Floor Fruit
GHOST_SEED.title: Ghost Mob Seed
GHOST_SEED.description: Whenever you Rest, gain 1 Intangible next combat.
GHOST_SEED.flavor: Plant it in a dead mob. See what grows.
GNARLED_HAMMER.title: Gnarled Borough Hammer
GNARLED_HAMMER.description: Whenever you Upgrade a card at a Rest Site, also Upgrade a random card.
GNARLED_HAMMER.flavor: Two upgrades for the price of one nap.
KIFUDA.title: Dungeon Talisman
KIFUDA.description: At the start of combat, add 1 Miracle to your hand.
KIFUDA.flavor: Miracles happen. Rarely. But they happen.
LAVA_LAMP.title: Lava Floor Lamp
LEES_WAFFLE.title: Crawler's Waffle
LEES_WAFFLE.description: Upon pickup, gain 7 Max HP. Heal 7 HP.
LEES_WAFFLE.flavor: Dungeon waffles. Better than they sound.
MEMBERSHIP_CARD.title: Borough Membership Card
MINIATURE_TENT.title: Crawler's Pup Tent
MINIATURE_TENT.description: At the start of each Rest Site, choose an additional option.
MYSTIC_LIGHTER.title: Dungeon Lighter
MYSTIC_LIGHTER.description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, gain 1 random rare card.
MYSTIC_LIGHTER.flavor: Flick it for luck. Sometimes it works.
NINJA_SCROLL.title: Assassin's Scroll
NINJA_SCROLL.description: Start each combat with 3 Shivs in hand.
NINJA_SCROLL.flavor: From the ninja mob floor. Floor 5. Don't go there.
ORRERY.title: Dungeon Orrery
ORRERY.description: Upon pickup, choose and add 5 cards to your deck.
ORRERY.flavor: A model of the dungeon. All 18 floors.
PUNCH_DAGGER.title: Knuckle Dagger
PUNCH_DAGGER.description: Whenever you play 4 or more Attacks in a turn, gain 2 Energy next turn.
RINGINGING_TRIANGLE.title: Broadcast Dinner Bell
RINGINGING_TRIANGLE.description: Every time you play 3 cards, gain 1 Energy.
ROYAL_STAMP.title: Primus Royal Stamp
ROYAL_STAMP.description: Whenever you upgrade a card, heal 3 HP.
ROYAL_STAMP.flavor: Officially approved by the Primus. Somehow.
RUNIC_CAPACITOR.title: Dungeon Capacitor
RUNIC_CAPACITOR.description: Start each combat with 3 extra Orb slots.
RUNIC_CAPACITOR.flavor: Stores dungeon energy. Lots of it.
SCREAMING_FLAGON.title: Screaming Skull Juice Mug
SCREAMING_FLAGON.description: Whenever you use a potion, gain 3 Block.
SCREAMING_FLAGON.flavor: It screams when you drink from it.
SLING_OF_COURAGE.title: Sling of the Crawler
SLING_OF_COURAGE.flavor: David had a sling. You have this.
THE_ABACUS.title: Loot Counter
THE_ABACUS.flavor: Count your blessings. And your Block.
TOOLBOX.title: Crawler's Toolbox
TOOLBOX.description: At the start of each combat, choose 1 of 3 random colorless cards to add to your hand.
UNDYING_SIGIL.title: Undying Crawler Sigil
UNDYING_SIGIL.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, return a random Exhausted card to your hand.
UNDYING_SIGIL.flavor: Death is a revolving door down here.
VITRUVIAN_MINION.title: Vitruvian Mob
VITRUVIAN_MINION.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity.
VITRUVIAN_MINION.flavor: Perfect proportions. For a dungeon mob.
WING_CHARM.title: Ovicopter Wing Charm
WING_CHARM.description: Whenever you play a Power, gain 3 Block.
ALCHEMICAL_COFFER.title: Alchemist's Loot Coffer
ALCHEMICAL_COFFER.description: Gain 1 random potion at the start of each combat.
ARCANE_SCROLL.title: Ancient Floor Scroll
ARCANE_SCROLL.description: Upon pickup, Upgrade all Strikes and Defends.
ARCANE_SCROLL.flavor: Handwritten by a crawler who ascended.
ARCHAIC_TOOTH.title: Archaic Floor Beast Tooth
ARCHAIC_TOOTH.description: Whenever an enemy dies, heal 5 HP.
ARCHAIC_TOOTH.flavor: From a beast so old it predates the dungeon.
ASTROLABE.title: Dungeon Astrolabe
ASTROLABE.description: Upon pickup, choose and Transform 3 cards, Upgrading them.
ASTROLABE.flavor: Navigate the dungeon by its own twisted stars.
BEAUTIFUL_BRACELET.title: Donut's Diamond Bracelet
BEAUTIFUL_BRACELET.flavor: Princess Donut demands only the finest jewelry.
BIIIG_HUG.title: Mongo's Big Hug
BIIIG_HUG.description: At the start of each combat, gain 14 Block.
BIIIG_HUG.flavor: Mongo loves you. Mongo squeeze. Can't breathe.
BLACK_STAR.title: Dark Star of the Dungeon
BLESSED_ANTLER.title: Blessed Stag Mob Antler
BLESSED_ANTLER.description: Whenever you enter a ? room, heal 12 HP.
BLESSED_ANTLER.flavor: From the mythical stag of floor 8.
BLOOD_SOAKED_ROSE.title: Blood-Soaked Dungeon Rose
BLOOD_SOAKED_ROSE.description: Whenever you lose HP, gain 1 Intangible.
BOOMING_CONCH.title: Booming Broadcast Conch
BOOMING_CONCH.description: Whenever you play a Power, draw 2 cards.
BOOMING_CONCH.flavor: Hold it to your ear. Hear the audience scream.
BRILLIANT_SCARF.title: Brilliant Crawler Scarf
BRILLIANT_SCARF.description: Retain all cards at end of turn.
CALLING_BELL.title: Stairwell Bell
CALLING_BELL.description: Upon pickup, gain 3 relics. Gain 3 Curses.
CHOICES_PARADOX.title: Paradox of the Stairwell
CLAWS.title: Donut's Claws
CLAWS.description: At the start of combat, deal 8 damage to a random enemy.
CLAWS.flavor: Princess Donut's manicure is a weapon.
CROSSBOW.title: Crawler's Crossbow
CROSSBOW.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Strength for each Power in play.
CURSED_PEARL.title: Cursed Dungeon Pearl
CURSED_PEARL.description: Whenever you Scry, heal HP equal to cards Scryed.
DELICATE_FROND.title: Delicate Floor Fern
DELICATE_FROND.flavor: Grows in the blood. Thrives in the suffering.
DIAMOND_DIADEM.title: Diamond Tiara of the Primus
DIAMOND_DIADEM.flavor: Worth a fortune. On any floor.
DISTINGUISHED_CAPE.title: Borant's Distinguished Cape
DISTINGUISHED_CAPE.description: Whenever you play a card that costs 2+, gain 2 Strength this turn.
DISTINGUISHED_CAPE.flavor: Borant wore it to executions. Now it's yours.
DRIFTWOOD.title: Stairwell Driftwood
DRIFTWOOD.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Block for each card in deck.
DUSTY_TOME.title: Dusty Crawl Record
DUSTY_TOME.description: Every 3 turns, add a random Power to your hand. It costs 0.
DUSTY_TOME.flavor: Records of every crawl. The failures fill most pages.
ECTOPLASM.title: Ghost Floor Ectoplasm
ECTOPLASM.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You can no longer gain Gold.
ECTOPLASM.flavor: The ghost floor takes your money and your dignity.
ELECTRIC_SHRYMP.title: Electric Shrimp Mob
ELECTRIC_SHRYMP.description: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning for each Orb slot.
EMPTY_CAGE.title: Empty Mob Cage
EMPTY_CAGE.description: Upon pickup, remove 2 cards from your deck.
EMPTY_CAGE.flavor: Whatever was in here escaped. Good for you.
FIDDLE.title: Dungeon Fiddle
FIDDLE.flavor: Play it while the dungeon burns.
FUR_COAT.title: Floor Beast Fur Coat
GLASS_EYE.title: Glass Dungeon Eye
GLASS_EYE.description: Whenever you Scry, gain 2 Block for each card moved to bottom.
GLITTER.title: Sponsor Glitter
GLITTER.flavor: This broadcast brought to you by GlitterCorp™.
GOLDEN_COMPASS.title: Golden Dungeon Compass
GOLDEN_COMPASS.description: The first 3 floors always have a ? room option.
GOLDEN_COMPASS.flavor: Points toward loot. Sometimes toward death.
GOLDEN_PEARL.title: Golden Dungeon Pearl
GOLDEN_PEARL.description: Whenever you Scry, gain 1 Mantra for each card Scryed.
IRON_CLUB.title: Iron Floor Club
IRON_CLUB.description: Attacks deal 3 more damage to enemies with Vulnerable.
JEWELED_MASK.title: Jeweled Audience Mask
JEWELRY_BOX.title: Loot Box Deluxe
JEWELRY_BOX.flavor: What's in the box? WHAT'S IN THE BOX?!
LARGE_CAPSULE.title: Large Loot Capsule
LARGE_CAPSULE.description: Upon pickup, gain 2 random rare potions.
LARGE_CAPSULE.flavor: Twist to open. Contents may explode.
LAVA_ROCK.title: Lava Floor Fragment
LAVA_ROCK.description: At the start of combat, Channel 1 Fire.
LEAD_PAPERWEIGHT.title: Lead Dungeon Paperweight
LEAD_PAPERWEIGHT.description: Upon pickup, gain 2 random uncommon relics.
LEAFY_POULTICE.title: Floor Herb Poultice
LEAFY_POULTICE.description: Whenever you Rest, gain 2 Regeneration next combat.
LEAFY_POULTICE.flavor: Natural healing. In an unnatural dungeon.
LOOMING_FRUIT.title: Ominous Dungeon Fruit
LORDS_PARASOL.title: Primus Parasol
LORDS_PARASOL.description: At the start of Boss combats, gain 3 Artifact.
LOST_COFFER.title: Lost Crawler's Cache
LOST_COFFER.description: Upon pickup, gain 2 random relics and 200 Gold.
MASSIVE_SCROLL.title: Massive Floor Blueprint
MASSIVE_SCROLL.flavor: Unroll it. Keep unrolling. Keep going.
MEAT_CLEAVER.title: Dungeon Butcher's Cleaver
MEAT_CLEAVER.description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 HP.
MEAT_CLEAVER.flavor: The butcher of floor 7 left this behind.
MUSIC_BOX.title: Dungeon Music Box
MUSIC_BOX.description: At the start of turn 1, apply 1 Vulnerable and 1 Weak to ALL enemies.
MUSIC_BOX.flavor: The tune is catchy. Fatally so.
NEOWS_TORMENT.title: Dungeon Master's Torment
NEOWS_TORMENT.description: At the start of combat, lose 3 HP. Gain 2 Energy.
NEOWS_TORMENT.flavor: The AI dungeon master enjoys your suffering.
NEW_LEAF.title: New Floor Leaf
NEW_LEAF.description: Rest Sites now offer an additional Transform option.
NEW_LEAF.flavor: Turn over a new leaf. Or burn it. Your choice.
NUTRITIOUS_OYSTER.title: Nutritious Dungeon Oyster
NUTRITIOUS_OYSTER.description: Upon pickup, gain 5 Max HP. Heal to full.
NUTRITIOUS_SOUP.title: Crawler's Mystery Soup
NUTRITIOUS_SOUP.description: Upon pickup, heal to full HP.
PAELS_BLOOD.title: Floor Boss Blood
PAELS_BLOOD.description: Gain 1 Energy each turn. Lose 1 Max HP after each combat.
PAELS_BLOOD.flavor: Power at a cost. Always a cost.
PAELS_CLAW.title: Floor Boss Claw
PAELS_CLAW.description: Whenever you play an Attack, deal 1 additional damage.
PAELS_EYE.title: Floor Boss Eye
PAELS_EYE.description: Scry 1 at the start of each turn.
PAELS_FLESH.title: Floor Boss Flesh
PAELS_FLESH.description: Whenever you play a Skill, heal 1 HP.
PAELS_FLESH.flavor: Regenerating floor boss meat. Don't think about it.
PAELS_GROWTH.title: Floor Boss Tumor
PAELS_GROWTH.description: At the start of each combat, gain Max HP equal to the floor number.
PAELS_HORN.title: Floor Boss Horn
PAELS_HORN.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Thorns.
PAELS_LEGION.title: Floor Boss Legion
PAELS_LEGION.description: At the start of combat, summon 2 friendly minions.
PAELS_LEGION.flavor: We are many. We are boss parts.
PAELS_TEARS.title: Floor Boss Tears
PAELS_TEARS.description: Whenever you shuffle, apply 2 Weak to ALL enemies.
PAELS_TEARS.flavor: Even bosses cry. Usually when dying.
PAELS_TOOTH.title: Floor Boss Fang
PAELS_TOOTH.description: Whenever an enemy dies, deal 10 damage to a random enemy.
PAELS_WING.title: Floor Boss Wing
PAELS_WING.description: Gain 1 additional card draw per turn.
PANDORAS_BOX.title: Pandora's Loot Box
PANDORAS_BOX.description: Upon pickup, Transform ALL Strikes and Defends.
PANDORAS_BOX.flavor: Open it. You know you want to.
PHILOSOPHERS_STONE.title: Philosopher's Dungeon Stone
PHILOSOPHERS_STONE.description: Gain 1 Energy each turn. ALL enemies gain 1 Strength.
PHILOSOPHERS_STONE.flavor: Equivalent exchange. The dungeon's favorite principle.
POMANDER.title: Dungeon Air Freshener
POMANDER.description: Curses are Enchanted instead of Cursed.
POMANDER.flavor: Smells like floor cleaner and desperation.
PRECARIOUS_SHEARS.title: Precarious Floor Shears
PRECARIOUS_SHEARS.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Strength. Lose 3 HP.
PRECISE_SCISSORS.title: Precise Crawler Scissors
PRECISE_SCISSORS.description: At the start of combat, Exhaust a random card. Gain 2 Strength.
PRESERVED_FOG.title: Preserved Floor Fog
PRESERVED_FOG.description: Whenever you play a card, 10% chance to gain Intangible.
PRESERVED_FOG.flavor: Bottled from the fog floor. Misty.
PRISMATIC_GEM.title: Prismatic Dungeon Gem
PRISMATIC_GEM.description: Card rewards contain cards from ALL colors.
PRISMATIC_GEM.flavor: All the colors of the dungeon rainbow.
PUMPKIN_CANDLE.title: Jack-o-Crawler
RADIANT_PEARL.title: Radiant Dungeon Pearl
RADIANT_PEARL.description: Whenever you Scry, gain 1 Strength for each card moved to bottom.
RADIANT_PEARL.flavor: It glows brighter with each vision.
RUNIC_PYRAMID.title: Runic Dungeon Pyramid
RUNIC_PYRAMID.description: At the end of your turn, do not discard your hand.
RUNIC_PYRAMID.flavor: Built by crawlers who refused to let go.
SAI.title: Crawler's Trident
SAI.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a turn, gain 1 Block.
SAND_CASTLE.title: Dungeon Sand Castle
SAND_CASTLE.description: Gain 20 Block at the start of each combat. Lose 5 Block each turn.
SAND_CASTLE.flavor: Temporary protection. Like everything down here.
SCROLL_BOXES.title: Scroll Storage Boxes
SCROLL_BOXES.description: Upon pickup, choose 3 cards to Upgrade.
SEA_GLASS.title: Aquatic Floor Glass
SEA_GLASS.description: At the start of combat, Channel 1 of each Orb type.
SEAL_OF_GOLD.title: Primus Gold Seal
SEAL_OF_GOLD.flavor: The Primus pays well. When forced.
SERE_TALON.title: Dried Floor Talon
SERE_TALON.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Strength for each relic you own.
SERE_TALON.flavor: Collect relics. Get stronger. Simple math.
SIGNET_RING.title: Crawler's Signet Ring
SIGNET_RING.description: Upon pickup, gain 100 Gold. Shops have 25% discount.
SILVER_CRUCIBLE.title: Silver Dungeon Crucible
SILVER_CRUCIBLE.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Focus for each Orb slot.
SILVER_CRUCIBLE.flavor: Melt down your fear. Forge it into power.
SMALL_CAPSULE.title: Small Loot Capsule
SMALL_CAPSULE.description: Upon pickup, gain 2 random common potions.
SNECKO_EYE.title: Snecko's Dungeon Eye
SNECKO_EYE.description: Draw 2 additional cards each turn. Card costs are randomized.
SOZU.title: Dungeon Totem
SOZU.description: Gain 1 Energy each turn. You can no longer gain potions.
SOZU.flavor: Power at the cost of chemistry.
SPIKED_GAUNTLETS.title: Spiked Crawler Gauntlets
SPIKED_GAUNTLETS.description: Whenever you gain Block, gain 1 Thorns this turn.
STONE_HUMIDIFIER.title: Dungeon Humidifier
STONE_HUMIDIFIER.description: Whenever you channel an Orb, gain 3 Block.
STONE_HUMIDIFIER.flavor: Keeps the air moist. Dungeon standard.
STORYBOOK.title: Donut's Memoir
STORYBOOK.description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 3 rare cards to add to your deck.
STORYBOOK.flavor: Chapter 1: I Am Princess Donut, and I Am Magnificent.
TANXS_WHISTLE.title: Dungeon AI Whistle
TANXS_WHISTLE.description: At the start of each turn, add a random 0-cost card to your hand.
THROWING_AXE.title: Crawler's Throwing Axe
THROWING_AXE.description: Whenever you play a Skill, deal 5 damage to a random enemy.
THROWING_AXE.flavor: Throw it. Somehow it comes back.
TOASTY_MITTENS.title: Toasty Crawler Mittens
TOASTY_MITTENS.description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 Block for each card Retained.
TOUCH_OF_OROBAS.title: Touch of the Dungeon Master
TOUCH_OF_OROBAS.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Demonform.
TOUCH_OF_OROBAS.flavor: The AI dungeon master left its mark.
TOY_BOX.title: Loot Box Collection
TOY_BOX.description: Upon pickup, gain 3 random uncommon relics.
TOY_BOX.flavor: Loot boxes within loot boxes. Inception.
TRI_BOOMERANG.title: Tri-Crawler-ang
TRI_BOOMERANG.description: At the start of combat, deal 5 damage to a random enemy 3 times.
TRI_BOOMERANG.flavor: It always comes back. Three times.
VELVET_CHOKER.title: Velvet Dungeon Choker
VELVET_CHOKER.description: Gain 1 Energy each turn. Cannot play more than 6 cards per turn.
VERY_HOT_COCOA.title: Very Hot Skull Juice Cocoa
VERY_HOT_COCOA.description: At the start of each combat, gain 2 Focus.
VERY_HOT_COCOA.flavor: Skull Juice mixed with cocoa. Burns twice.
WAR_HAMMER.title: Borough War Hammer
WAR_HAMMER.description: At the start of combat, gain 4 Strength. Draw 2 fewer cards.
WHISPERING_EARRING.title: Whispering Audience Earring
WHISPERING_EARRING.description: At the start of each turn, Scry 1.
YUMMY_COOKIE.title: Yummy Crawler Cookie
YUMMY_COOKIE.description: Upon pickup, heal 20 HP. Gain 5 Max HP.
YUMMY_COOKIE.flavor: Baked with love. And dungeon flour.
BIG_MUSHROOM.title: Big Dungeon Shroom
BIG_MUSHROOM.flavor: Eat it. What's the worst that could happen?
BING_BONG.title: Stairwell Doorbell
BING_BONG.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Energy. Play 1 fewer card turn 1.
BONE_TEA.title: Bone Marrow Tea
BONE_TEA.flavor: Brewed from floor mob bones. Acquired taste.
BYRDPIP.title: Ovicopter Hatchling
BYRDPIP.description: At the start of each combat, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
CHOSEN_CHEESE.title: Crawler's Chosen Cheese
CHOSEN_CHEESE.flavor: Aged to perfection. In a dungeon.
DARKSTONE_PERIAPT.title: Darkstone Dungeon Amulet
DARKSTONE_PERIAPT.description: Whenever you gain a Curse, gain 6 Max HP.
DARKSTONE_PERIAPT.flavor: The darker it gets, the stronger you become.
DAUGHTER_OF_THE_WIND.title: Wind Floor Daughter
DAUGHTER_OF_THE_WIND.description: Card rewards always contain a rare card.
DREAM_CATCHER.title: Dungeon Dream Catcher
DREAM_CATCHER.description: Whenever you Rest, choose a card to add to your deck.
DREAM_CATCHER.flavor: Dream of better cards. Wake up with them.
EMBER_TEA.title: Ember Floor Tea
EMBER_TEA.description: At the start of each combat, gain 2 Energy.
FAKE_ANCHOR.title: Counterfeit Floor Anchor
FAKE_ANCHOR.flavor: Almost as good as the real thing. Almost.
FAKE_BLOOD_VIAL.title: Counterfeit Blood Vial
FAKE_BLOOD_VIAL.description: At the start of each combat, heal 1 HP.
FAKE_HAPPY_FLOWER.title: Counterfeit Dungeon Bloom
FAKE_LEES_WAFFLE.title: Counterfeit Crawler Waffle
FAKE_LEES_WAFFLE.description: Upon pickup, gain 5 Max HP. Heal 5 HP.
FAKE_MANGO.title: Counterfeit Dungeon Mango
FAKE_MERCHANTS_RUG.title: Counterfeit Merchant's Rug
FAKE_ORICHALCUM.title: Counterfeit Orichalcum
FAKE_ORICHALCUM.description: If you end your turn without Block, gain 4 Block.
FAKE_SNECKO_EYE.title: Counterfeit Snecko Eye
FAKE_SNECKO_EYE.description: Draw 1 additional card each turn. Card costs are randomized.
FAKE_SNECKO_EYE.flavor: Half the vision. All the chaos.
FAKE_STRIKE_DUMMY.title: Counterfeit Training Dummy
FAKE_VENERABLE_TEA_SET.title: Counterfeit Tea Ceremony
FAKE_VENERABLE_TEA_SET.description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start next combat with 1 Energy.
FAKE_VENERABLE_TEA_SET.flavor: Tea bag instead of loose leaf.
FORGOTTEN_SOUL.title: Forgotten Crawler's Soul
FORGOTTEN_SOUL.description: Whenever you play a Power, heal 3 HP.
FORGOTTEN_SOUL.flavor: They didn't make it. Their spirit helps you.
FRAGRANT_MUSHROOM.title: Fragrant Dungeon Shroom
FRESNEL_LENS.title: Broadcast Camera Lens
FRESNEL_LENS.description: At the start of combat, Scry 5.
FRESNEL_LENS.flavor: See what's coming. The audience already knows.
HAND_DRILL.title: Crawler's Hand Drill
HAND_DRILL.description: Whenever you break an enemy's Block, apply 2 Vulnerable.
HAND_DRILL.flavor: Drill through their defenses. Then through them.
HISTORY_COURSE.title: Dungeon History Lesson
HISTORY_COURSE.description: Upon pickup, Upgrade all cards in deck.
HISTORY_COURSE.flavor: Those who study the dungeon are doomed to repeat it.
LOST_WISP.title: Lost Dungeon Wisp
LOST_WISP.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Energy.
LOST_WISP.flavor: Follow the wisp. Or don't. It follows you.
MAW_BANK.title: Dungeon Bank
MAW_BANK.description: Gain 12 Gold at the start of each combat. Lose this relic upon spending Gold.
MR_STRUGGLES.title: Mr. Strugglesnuggles
MR_STRUGGLES.description: Gain 1 Strength at the start of each combat.
MR_STRUGGLES.flavor: A stuffed animal that has seen things.
POLLINOUS_CORE.title: Pollinous Mob Core
POLLINOUS_CORE.description: Whenever you Channel an Orb, gain 2 Block.
ROYAL_POISON.title: Primus Royal Poison
ROYAL_POISON.description: At the start of each combat, apply 6 Poison to a random enemy.
SWORD_OF_JADE.title: Jade Crawler Sword
SWORD_OF_JADE.description: Whenever you play an Attack, heal 1 HP.
SWORD_OF_STONE.title: Stone Crawler Sword
SWORD_OF_STONE.flavor: Pull it from the dungeon floor. You're the chosen one. Maybe.
TEA_OF_DISCOURTESY.title: Rude Dungeon Tea
TEA_OF_DISCOURTESY.flavor: Brewed without manners. Tastes like aggression.
THE_BOOT.title: The Floor 1 Boot
THE_BOOT.description: Whenever you deal less than 5 damage, increase it to 5.
THE_BOOT.flavor: Carl's only footwear for three floors.
WONGO_CUSTOMER_APPRECIATION_BADGE.title: Wongo's Loyalty Badge
WONGO_CUSTOMER_APPRECIATION_BADGE.descri: Shops have 15% discount. Start with 1 additional potion.
WONGO_CUSTOMER_APPRECIATION_BADGE.flavor: Valued customer since the crawl began.
WONGOS_MYSTERY_TICKET.title: Wongo's Golden Ticket
WONGOS_MYSTERY_TICKET.description: Upon pickup, gain a random Ancient relic.
DONUTS_TIARA.title: Donut's Tiara
DONUTS_TIARA.flavor: A jewel-encrusted tiara fit for the most magnificent cat in the dungeon.
DUNGEON_GUIDE_RELIC.title: Dungeon Guide
DUNGEON_GUIDE_RELIC.flavor: A battered pamphlet titled 'So You're Going to Die: A Crawler's Companion.'
CRAWLER_BISCUIT_TIN.title: Crawler Biscuit Tin
CRAWLER_BISCUIT_TIN.description: At start of combat, heal 6 HP.
CRAWLER_BISCUIT_TIN.flavor: Standard issue nutrition. Tastes like cardboard and broken dreams.
TORCH_OF_THE_DESCENDER.title: Torch of the Descender
TORCH_OF_THE_DESCENDER.description: At start of combat, apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
TORCH_OF_THE_DESCENDER.flavor: The light of a descender burns brighter than any dungeon darkness.
SKULL_JUICE_BOTTLE.title: Skull Juice Bottle
SKULL_JUICE_BOTTLE.description: First turn of combat, gain 1 Energy.
SKULL_JUICE_BOTTLE.flavor: Skull Juice™ - The Official Beverage of the Crawl! Side effects may include death.
PROTECTIVE_SHELL_SHARD.title: Protective Shell Shard
PROTECTIVE_SHELL_SHARD.description: Gain 3 Block at start of each turn.
PROTECTIVE_SHELL_SHARD.flavor: A fragment of Mongo's eggshell. Still warm.
LOOT_BOX_KEY.title: Loot Box Key
LOOT_BOX_KEY.flavor: Brought to you by the Dungeon Sponsor Program. Odds of getting something useful: low.
STUDIO_AUDIENCE_BADGE.title: Studio Audience Badge
STUDIO_AUDIENCE_BADGE.description: Gain 1 additional Rating when gaining Rating.
STUDIO_AUDIENCE_BADGE.flavor: The studio audience goes WILD! (Applause sign is mandatory.)
BORANTS_CONTRACT.title: Borant's Contract
BORANTS_CONTRACT.description: Double combat gold. Lose 5 Max HP.
BORANTS_CONTRACT.flavor: Read the fine print. Actually, don't. It's worse than you think.
ROYAL_CRIERS_HORN.title: Royal Crier's Horn
ROYAL_CRIERS_HORN.description: In Elite fights, gain 3 Strength turn 1.
ROYAL_CRIERS_HORN.flavor: HEAR YE, HEAR YE! The crawler approaches! (Run.)
FACTION_MEMBERSHIP_CARD.title: Faction Membership Card
FACTION_MEMBERSHIP_CARD.description: Start combat with random Power card (costs 0).
FACTION_MEMBERSHIP_CARD.flavor: Membership has its privileges. Annual dues are your suffering.
MONGOS_SADDLE.title: Mongo's Saddle
MONGOS_SADDLE.description: Start of turn: deal 6 damage to ALL, gain 6 Block.
MONGOS_SADDLE.flavor: Ride the dinosaur. The dinosaur rides into battle. Everyone's happy.
THE_IRON_TANGLE_RELIC.title: The Iron Tangle
THE_IRON_TANGLE_RELIC.description: When applying debuff, apply 1 additional stack.
THE_IRON_TANGLE_RELIC.flavor: A knot of iron chains that writhes with malicious intent.
HEKLAS_EYE.title: Hekla's Eye
HEKLAS_EYE.description: Start of combat, play top 2 cards for free.
HEKLAS_EYE.flavor: Hekla sees your hand. Hekla plays your hand. Hekla judges your hand.
FLOOR1_PANTS.title: Floor 1 Pants
FLOOR1_PANTS.description: +1 Energy per turn. Start combat with 10 less HP.
FLOOR1_PANTS.flavor: Carl had no pants. The universe found this hilarious.
DESPERADOS_RING.title: Desperado's Ring
DESPERADOS_RING.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain 2 Ratings.
DESPERADOS_RING.flavor: The audience loves sacrifice. Give them what they want.
LEVEL1_TOOLTIP.title: Level 1 Tooltip
LEVEL1_TOOLTIP.description: Start with 2 extra cards in hand. 2 Recap Episodes shuffled in.
DUNGEON_MASTERS_REMOTE.title: Dungeon Master's Remote
DUNGEON_MASTERS_REMOTE.description: Once per combat, take an extra turn.
DUNGEON_MASTERS_REMOTE.flavor: The AI dungeon master dropped this. It wants it back. Too bad.
SKULL_JUICE_SIX_PACK.title: Skull Juice Six-Pack
SKULL_JUICE_SIX_PACK.description: Heal 10 HP at shops. Shops cost 15% more.
SKULL_JUICE_SIX_PACK.flavor: Six cans of liquid regret. Marked up because you're desperate.
CARLS_FANNY_PACK.title: Carl's Fanny Pack
CARLS_FANNY_PACK.flavor: It's not fashionable. It's functional. Carl doesn't care.
DONUTS_MEMOIR_DRAFT.title: Donut's Memoir Draft
DONUTS_MEMOIR_DRAFT.description: Play 10 cards in combat, gain 10 Gold after.
DONUTS_MEMOIR_DRAFT.flavor: Working title: 'Princess Donut the Queen Anne Chantilly: My Magnificent Life.'
KATIAS_LOCKPICK.title: Katia's Lockpick
KATIAS_LOCKPICK.description: Start combat: 1 random card in hand costs 0.
KATIAS_LOCKPICK.flavor: Katia can open anything. Doors. Locks. Enemies.
